name: Chicken Alejandro
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium heat, cook onions and garlic in margarine until tender.
2. Stir in salsa, sugar, cinnamon, ground cloves, and bay leaf; add chicken. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Remove chicken to a heated platter; keep warm.
4. Dissolve cornstarch in tomato sauce in a small bowl.
5. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the skillet.
6. Cook, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and begins to boil.
7. Add orange sections; heat through.
8. Discard bay leaf.
9. Serve chicken over rice with the sauce poured over all.
